overview.minides: BMW's most ambitious 7 Series yet — radical design, a 31.3-inch Theatre Screen, and the most technology ever packed into a BMW sedan.
overview.description: The seventh-generation BMW 7 Series (G70) launched in India in January 2023. It brings a dramatic design overhaul — split crystal-headlight kidneys, flush door handles, and an illuminated kidney grille. Inside, the 14.9-inch curved iDrive 8 display, a 31.3-inch 8K Theatre Screen for rear passengers, and 40-speaker Bowers & Wilkins audio define the cabin on top trims. All variants carry a 48V mild-hybrid system. India receives four variants: 740d M Sport (diesel RWD), 740i M Sport (petrol RWD), 760Li xDrive M Sport (V8 petrol AWD), and M760e xDrive (PHEV AWD).

suspension.front: Double wishbone (air suspension with Adaptive M Suspension optional)
suspension.rear: Five-link (Integral V; air suspension standard on 760Li/M760e)
suspension.additionalTech: Integral Active Steering (rear-wheel steering) standard on 760Li/M760e

brakes.front: Compound / M Sport Blue 4-piston fixed caliper

b58-phev-490hp.name: B58 3.0L Petrol + eDrive PHEV (M760e)
b58-phev-490hp.engineType: B58 Inline-6 + Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor

variants.name: 740d M Sport
keyFeatures: 3.0L B57 Inline-6 TwinPower Turbo Diesel (286 hp)
ZF 8-Speed Steptronic Sport with Paddle Shifters

variants.name: 740i M Sport
keyFeatures: 3.0L B58 Inline-6 TwinPower Turbo Petrol (375 hp)
ZF 8-Speed Steptronic Sport with Paddle Shifters
M Sport Exterior + M Aerodynamics Package

variants.name: 760Li xDrive M Sport
keyFeatures: 4.4L N63 V8 TwinPower Turbo (544 hp) + 48V Mild Hybrid
Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Surround Sound (40 Speakers)
Rear Touchscreen Door Controls (5.5-inch per door)
Executive Lounge Rear Seating with Massage & Ventilation

variants.name: M760e xDrive
keyFeatures: 3.0L Petrol + Electric Motor PHEV — 490 hp Combined
18.7 kWh Battery — 77–87 km Pure EV Range (WLTP)
BMW Driving Assistant Professional + Parking Assistant Pro
